title: System Model: Input–Output Description
summary: This page demonstrates the use of differential operator D notation to express input-output equations for linear systems. It includes Example 1.17, which derives the input-output equation for a series RC circuit (R=15Ω, C=1/5 F) using operator notation, showing the loop equation expressed both in integral form and operator form.

figures.caption: An RC series circuit with a voltage source x(t), resistor R = 15 Ω, and capacitor C = 1/5 F, used to find the loop current i(t) and capacitor voltage y(t).
